element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns basic combat mechanics against standard melee opponents
Enemies' attacks and weapons vary throughout the game, escalating challenge
Goal-oriented progression: defeat enough enemies to unlock exit door
Optional content branches for score/reward maximization
Long-term goal that provides narrative arc through all levels
Secondary objective: retrieve 10 stolen treasures across levels

typical_relief_triggers: Door opens after defeating enemy quota
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-based room clearing with boss-gate progression; tension builds as enemies accumulate, releases when quota met and door opens

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Bonus levels are optional branches that players can enter

difficulty_curve.early_game: Standard melee enemies introduce basic combat patterns
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Enemy weapon variation increases challenge and forces tactical adaptation

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level/room requires defeating a set quota of enemies before the exit door opens, allowing progression to next area
Optional side levels accessible during progression, providing risk-reward gameplay for score/reward maximization
Enemy attacks and weapons vary throughout the game, systematically increasing combat complexity
